heading: Interpleader
label: 1397 Interpleader
text: Any civil action of interpleader or in the nature of interpleader under may be brought in the judicial district in which one or more of the claimants reside.section 1335 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 41(26) (, par. 26, as added , ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 24Jan. 20, 1936, ch. 13, § 149 Stat. 1096Provisions of , U.S.C., 1940 ed., relating to jurisdiction are the basis of and other provisions thereof are incorporated in .section 41(26) of title 28section 1335 of this titlesection 2361 of this titleWords “civil action” were substituted for “suit,” in view of Rule 2 of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure.Changes were made in phraseology.
